title: cyperus overlaetii
intro: Cyperus overlaetii is a species of sedge, a type of monocotyledonous flowering plant, commonly found in wetland areas. The plant has been traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Cyperus overlaetii is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes are often used to make decoctions or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
